'''''Shadows of the Empire'' 5''' was the fifth issue in the six-part [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (comic series)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] series of comics, and was released on [[September 4]], [[1996]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

{{Comics-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''The bounty on Skywalker's head is good cold or warm, dead or alive. A live bounty will always bring a bigger reward than a dead one, but when the target leaves you no choice you take what you can get.''
